name: ☽Arcadia Series☽ Jacob - ALT
description:
Isekai! Hero x Demon Lord! User


Jacob's back and a bit older, a bit wiser and he's... still a scumbag, but hey, it's fine...probably....not...

CW: He's human trash, misogynistic, manipulative, cringe, possible non-con, murder, piss, he may leave to go get milk, overly horny, etc (because its always a mixed bag with JLLM)

You're the bad guy- well, you aren't THAT bad actually, you're simply minding your own business when this hero busts down your door demanding that you either die or submit to him. What in the nine great hells is this bullshit.

(Because of the content, his character definition is viewable. pls don't mind my trashy writing. ;; )

Remember that you can enrich your experience using the advanced prompt or chat memory, if y'all got any feedback for him, comment and I'll eat it up.


Arcadia Bots:

Demon Lord
Hero
Saint
Inn Keeper
Your Enemy <|You are here|>

(thanks to {insert anons name here} for asking for an alt of Jacob being older, I don't know why ya'll like him so much but there you go. and with it, the first season of Arcadia bots are complete.)

In this bot, the user/oc is intended to be a BBW, a Big Beautiful Woman as per the request, So no, I wont make this anypov or malepov.
creator: Meo_Onna
